description: Integer code for the observed, directional financial relationship type from the current stock (A) to the counterparty (B) on the as-of date; decode via this module’s PIT codebook

Signed integer code for the relationship type and direction between the focal stock and its counterparty within the All family union of MA, Partner, and Financial links, decoded using point-in-time module- and region-specific codebooks

Integer code encoding the type and direction of the partnership/alliance/contractual relationship between the focal stock (A) and counterparty (B) on the as-of date; requires module-local, date-specific PIT codebook to decode
Vendor/event-native categorical integer code indicating confidence, status, or classification of the financial relationship edge on that date; decode via PIT, module-specific codebook

Vendor-native integer code indicating the relationship’s confidence, status, or classification for each edge on that date, to be decoded via module-, region-, and date-specific point-in-time codebooks
Integer vendor-native categorical code describing confidence/status/classification of the partner relationship on the as-of date; decoding requires PIT, module/region/date-specific codebooks
Vendor-native quantitative impact or confidence score (typically 0–1) for the financial relationship edge on that date, used directly for weighting or propagation
Vendor-native quantitative impact or confidence score, typically between 0 and 1, used directly for weighting and propagation without local recalculation
Vendor-native quantitative impact or confidence score for the partnership edge on that as-of-date (typically 0–1), used directly for weighting/propagation and strictly point-in-time D1-lagged
